name: instant-api — admin.access from non-allowlist user
description: CRITICAL. Fires on any admin.access audit_log event from a user whose email is NOT in the configured ADMIN_EMAILS allowlist. This means the allowlist middleware failed open and an unauthorized user reached an admin handler. The query uses an `allowed = false` tag the middleware sets when it falls through the allowlist; if the middleware is correctly closed-by-default this tag is impossible to see in steady state. Source: audit_log kind = 'admin.access' emitted by the admin middleware (PR #66+).

nrql.query: SELECT count(*) FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND kind = 'admin.access' AND allowed = false
